title: Silvine Daze 200 Page A5 Subject Books with 3 Moveable Dividers [Assorted Pack of 3]
features: Pack contains 3x Project books in Blue, Green and Purple
description: Mixed pack of A5 Daze project books by Silvine. Each containing 200 pages of quality 80gsm paper, ruled 8mm feint and perforated for easy tear out. Includes 3 multicoloured moveable dividers for organisation. Pack contains 3 books in 3 assorted bright colours: Green, Purple and Yellow.
